Returns the configuration used by new validators.

Returns the configuration used by new validators.
configuration() - Static method in class com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.DefaultJavaValidators
Returns the configuration used by new validators.
configuration() - Method in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type.part.Validator
Returns the validator's configuration.
configuration() - Method in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.Validators
Returns the configuration used by new validators.
Configuration - Class in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Determines the behavior of a validator.
Configuration() - Constructor for class com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.Configuration
Creates a new configuration that: Has an empty context. Throws an exception on failure. Uses Object.equals(Object) to determine whether two objects are equal. Excludes this library from exception stack traces. Constructs exceptions lazily. May include a diff that compares the actual and expected values.

isStripped() - Method in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type.StringValidator
Ensures that the value does not contain leading or trailing whitespace, where whitespace is defined by String.strip().

Ensures that the value is a superclass or superinterface of type.

Ensures that the value does not contain leading or trailing whitespace, where whitespace is defined by String.trim().

Ensures that the value is true.

Ensures that the value is true.
isUri() - Method in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type.ObjectValidator
Ensures that the value is a URI.

Ensures that the value is a URL.
isValue() - Method in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.jackson.JsonNodeValidator
Ensures that the node contains a binary value, boolean, null, number or string.

Ensures that the value is a whole number.
isZero() - Method in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type.part.UnsignedNumber

J

JacksonAssumeThat - Interface in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.jackson
Creates validators for the Jackson API, throwing an exception if a failure occurs.
JacksonCheckIf - Interface in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.jackson
Creates validators for the Jackson API, recording any failures that occur.
JacksonRequireThat - Interface in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.jackson
Creates validators for the Jackson API, throwing an exception if a failure occurs.
JacksonValidators - Interface in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.jackson
Creates validators for the Jackson API with an independent configuration.
JavaAssumeThat - Interface in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Creates validators for class invariants and method postconditions of the Java API, throwing AssertionError if a failure occurs.
JavaCheckIf - Interface in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Creates validators for the Java API, recording any failures that occur.
JavaRequireThat - Interface in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Creates validators for method preconditions of the Java API, throwing an exception if a failure occurs.
JavaValidators - Interface in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Creates validators for the Java API with an independent configuration.
JsonNodeValidator<T> - Interface in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.jackson
Validates the state of a JsonNode, throwing an exception on the first failure.

XTERM_16_COLORS - Enum constant in enum class com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.terminal.TerminalEncoding
